dialogue_text: If ever you need us again,
source_excerpt: "If ever you need us again," she said, "come out into the field and call, and we shall hear you and come to your assistance. Good-bye!"

source_excerpt: "Good-bye!" they all answered, and away the Queen ran, while Dorothy held Toto tightly lest he should run after her and frighten her.
